dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal is context-dependent: enters LONG on price crossing above MA (uptrend reversal), enters SHORT when price stays below MA (downtrend confirmation). Used sma_10 as the source text references '10MA'. Exit conditions reversed from entry conditions per standard crossover logic. The AUTHOR_SILENT parameters (moving_average_period and minimum_price_movement) were inferred: sma_10 for period and crossover mechanism for price movement detection.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal is context-dependent: enters LONG on price crossing above MA (uptrend reversal), enters SHORT when price stays below MA (downtrend confirmation). Used sma_10 as the source text references '10MA'. Exit conditions reversed from entry conditions per standard crossover logic. source_rule_text: When price crosses above a moving average line, it signals a trend reversal from downtrend to uptrend; when price stays below MA lines, it confirms a downtrend.
